## Downloads

| Platform | File |
|----------|------|
| macOS (universal) | `agent-eval-{VERSION}-macos-universal.tar.gz` |
| Linux x86_64 | `agent-eval-{VERSION}-linux-x86_64.tar.gz` |
| Windows x86_64 | `agent-eval-{VERSION}-windows-x86_64.zip` |

Verify downloads with `agent-eval-{VERSION}-SHA256SUMS.txt`.

## Upgrading

```bash
# macOS / Linux
tar -xzf agent-eval-{VERSION}-<platform>.tar.gz
sudo mv agent-eval /usr/local/bin/
```
